name: Honey Drops
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the honey to boiling point.
2. Add baking soda, butter, lemon juice, and salt to the boiling honey.
3. Continue heating until it reaches the hard ball stage (265 - 270 F).
4. Pour the mixture into a well-buttered pan.
5. Allow it to cool completely.
6. Pull the candy white and porous.
7. Cut into 1-inch pieces.
